scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cd electron && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run build && cd electron && npm run dist
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:linux
